---

You are a specialist agent for the **n-s-r.dev** codebase — a personal portfolio and public component registry site owned by Naga Sai Rakshith (Rakshith, @n_s_rdotdev).

## Project Overview

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Framework | Next.js 16 (App Router, Turbopack) |
| Language | TypeScript (strict) |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS v4 + shadcn/ui |
| Database | Drizzle ORM + Neon (PostgreSQL serverless) |
| Auth | Better Auth |
| Package manager | pnpm |
| Path alias | `@/` → `src/` |

---

## Directory Map

```
src/
  app/
    globals.css          # Tailwind v4 theme entry; all CSS tokens defined here
    layout.tsx           # Root layout: <html>, Providers, font variables
    (app)/               # Main public site (portfolio, components, blog)
      layout.tsx         # Shell: SiteHeader + gutter grid + SiteFooter
      page.tsx           # Portfolio home
    testing/             # Internal testing route
  features/
    protfolio-page/      # Portfolio UI and data (user.ts, experience.ts, social-links.ts)
    blog/                # Blog post pages and components
    components-page/     # Components showcase (landing/listing)
    doc/                 # Documentation pages (fumadocs-core)
  components/            # Shared UI: nav, header, footer, MDX, code blocks, icons, etc.
  components/ui/         # shadcn/ui primitives
  registry/
    index.ts             # Canonical registry definition (shadcn Registry schema)
    components/          # Registry component source files
    api/ db/ lib/        # Registry API routes, DB utils, lib blocks
  lib/                   # Auth, fonts, utils, rehype/remark plugins, registry helpers
  hooks/                 # use-config, use-copy-to-clipboard, use-package-manager, etc.
  db/
    schema.ts            # Drizzle table definitions
    index.ts             # Neon + Drizzle client
  scripts/
    build-registry.mts   # Builds __registry__ JSON from src/registry/index.ts
    capture.mts          # Screenshot capture for registry previews
  __registry__/          # Auto-generated registry output — DO NOT edit manually
```

---

## Key npm Scripts

| Script | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `pnpm dev` | `next dev --turbopack` |
| `pnpm build` | Production build |
| `pnpm typecheck` | `tsc --noEmit` |
| `pnpm lint` | ESLint |
| `pnpm format` | Prettier over `**/*.{ts,tsx}` |
| `pnpm registry:build` | `shadcn build` (uses `registry.json` / `src/registry/index.ts`) |
| `pnpm registry:build-v2` | Runs build-registry script then `shadcn build` on autogenerated output |

---

## Styling Rules (Tailwind CSS v4)

- **Theme file**: `src/app/globals.css` — all `--custom-token` CSS vars are defined here.
- **Valid custom tokens** (both light and dark themes define these):
  - Custom: `--edge` (80% border/bg mix), `--line` (64% border/bg mix), `--link`, `--surface`, `--surface-foreground`, `--code`, `--code-foreground`, `--code-number`, `--code-highlight`, `--selection`, `--selection-foreground`
  - shadcn standard: `--background`, `--foreground`, `--primary`, `--primary-foreground`, `--secondary`, `--secondary-foreground`, `--muted`, `--muted-foreground`, `--accent`, `--accent-foreground`, `--destructive`, `--border`, `--input`, `--ring`, `--radius`, `--card`, `--card-foreground`, `--popover`, `--popover-foreground`, `--chart-1` through `--chart-5`, `--sidebar-*`
- `--accent-muted` is **NOT** a valid token — use `--accent` with opacity (e.g. `bg-accent/30`).
- **Shorthand CSS-var syntax** works only for bare properties: `w-(--token)` ✅. Fallbacks must use bracket arbitrary values: `pr-[var(--token,0)]` ✅, NOT `pr-(--token, 0)` ❌.
- Dark mode custom variant: `.dark *` — applied via `@custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark *))`.
- Color space: `oklch` throughout.

---

## Layout Rules

- Route shells (including `testing/`) must use `min-h-dvh`, not `h-dvh` — fixed height causes footer overlap on long content.
- Main content wrapper: `flex-1`; inner grid: `min-h-full` — ensures short pages fill viewport but tall pages can grow.
- In Next 16, any shared layout component that calls `usePathname()` on a dynamic route must be wrapped in `<Suspense>` with a stable fallback to avoid the blocking-route error.

---

## Component Registry

- Registry source: `src/registry/index.ts` (typed as `Registry` from `shadcn/schema`).
- Each item has `name`, `title`, `author`, `description`, `type` (`registry:block` | `registry:component` | `registry:lib` | `registry:file`), `dependencies`, `devDependencies`, `files[]`.
- `files[].target` is the destination path inside the consumer's project.
- Auto-generated output lives in `src/__registry__/` — never edit it by hand.
- Public registry JSON is served from `public/r/`.

**Current registry items** (in `src/registry/index.ts`):

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `better-auth` | `registry:block` | Auth setup: `src/lib/auth.ts`, `src/lib/auth-client/auth-client.ts`, API route handler |
| `drizzle` | `registry:block` | Drizzle + Neon setup: `db/index.ts`, `db/schema.ts`, `drizzle.config.ts` |

**Registry source file locations** (do NOT confuse with `src/registry/index.ts`):
- Components: `src/registry/components/auto-type-table/`, `src/registry/components/type-table/`
- Lib: `src/registry/lib/auth/`, `src/registry/lib/auth-client/`
- API: `src/registry/api/auth/`
- DB: `src/registry/db/config/`, `src/registry/db/db/`, `src/registry/db/schema/`

---

## MDX / Content Pipeline

- MDX rendered via `next-mdx-remote` with custom rehype/remark plugins in `src/lib/`:
  - `rehype-code-block.ts` — code block styling
  - `rehype-component.ts` — embeds custom components
  - `rehype-npm-command.ts` — transforms npm → pnpm/yarn/bun tabs
  - `rehype-add-query-params.ts` — link query-param injection
  - `remark-code-import.js` — imports code from files into MDX fences
  - `remark-component.ts`

**Doc content** lives in `src/features/doc/content/*.mdx`. Frontmatter shape (`DocMetadata`):
```ts
{
  title: string
  description: string
  image?: string          // OG image (absolute URL or /public path, 1200×630)
  category?: string       // e.g. "components" — maps to /components/[slug] routes
  new?: boolean           // Shows "New" badge in UI
  pinned?: boolean        // Pins post to top of list
  createdAt: string       // ISO date e.g. "2025-01-15"
  updatedAt: string       // ISO date
}
```

Data helpers in `src/features/doc/data/documents.ts`:
- `getAllDocs()` — all docs sorted by pinned then `createdAt` desc
- `getDocBySlug(slug)` — single doc lookup
- `getDocsByCategory(category)` — filter by `metadata.category`
- `findNeighbour(slug, category)` — prev/next navigation

**Existing MDX content files**: `welcome.mdx`, `better-auth-setup.mdx`, `drizzle-setup.mdx`

---

## Database

- ORM: Drizzle with `drizzle-orm/pg-core`.
- Driver: `@neondatabase/serverless`.
- Config: `drizzle.config.ts` at project root.
- Schema: `src/db/schema.ts`.
- To add a table: define it in `schema.ts` then run `drizzle-kit push` or generate a migration.

---

## Auth

- Provider: Better Auth (`src/lib/auth.ts`).
- Client: `src/lib/auth-client/auth-client.ts`.
- Route handler: `src/registry/api/auth/route/route.ts` (registry block).

---

## Fonts

Configured in `src/lib/fonts.ts` and applied via `fontVariables` in the root layout:
- **Sans**: Geist (Google Font, `--font-geist` → `--font-sans`)
- **Mono**: GeistMono (`--font-geist-mono` → `--font-mono`)
- **Pixel variants**: `GeistPixelSquare`, `GeistPixelCircle`, `GeistPixelGrid`, `GeistPixelLine`, `GeistPixelTriangle` (all from `geist/font/pixel`)

---

## Portfolio Data Structure

All data lives in `src/features/protfolio-page/data/`:
- `user.ts` — `USER` constant: name, bio, avatar, email (base64), phone (base64), jobs, social links, keywords
- `experience.ts` — `EXPERIENCES` array with company, positions, skills, employment dates
- `social-links.ts` — `SOCIAL_LINKS` array: GitHub, GitHub Personal, LinkedIn, X
- `tech-stack.ts` — `TECH_STACK` array with key, title, href, icon, categories

**Portfolio components** live in `src/features/protfolio-page/components/`:
- `profile-cover.tsx`, `profile-header.tsx`, `tech-stack.tsx`, `social-link/`, `social-link-item.tsx`
- `experiences/`, `work-experience/`, `overview/`

---

## Key Dependencies (selected)

| Package | Role |
|---|---|
| `motion` (v12) | Animations (Framer Motion) |
| `jotai` | Global state |
| `nuqs` | URL search-param state |
| `fumadocs-core` | Docs navigation/search, TOC (`getTableOfContents`) |
| `fumadocs-typescript` | Auto type-table generation |

| `lucide-react` | Lucide icons |

| `react-hook-form` + `zod` | Forms and validation |
| `cmdk` | Command palette (⌘K) |
| `@openpanel/web` + `posthog-js` | Analytics |
| `libphonenumber-js` | Phone number formatting (metadata: `src/assets/libphonenumber.metadata.json`) |
| `gray-matter` | Frontmatter parsing for MDX docs |
| `schema-dts` | JSON-LD structured data types |
| `next-themes` | Dark/light mode via `ThemeProvider` |
| `react-resizable-panels` | Resizable panel layouts |
| `react-medium-image-zoom` | Image zoom |
| `@c15t/nextjs` | Consent management |

**Available `src/components/ui/` primitives**: `alert`, `button`, `button-group`, `collapsible`, `command`, `copy-button`, `dialog`, `dropdown-menu`, `input`, `input-group`, `kbd`, `popover`, `separator`, `sonner`, `table`, `tabs`, `tag`, `testimonial`, `text-flip`, `textarea`, `tooltip`, `typography`

---

## Constraints

- DO NOT edit files under `src/__registry__/` — they are auto-generated.
- DO NOT use `--accent-muted` as a token — it does not exist. Use `--accent` with opacity instead.
- DO NOT use `h-dvh` in route shells; always use `min-h-dvh`.
- DO NOT add `usePathname` (or any client hook that depends on the URL) to a shared layout without a `<Suspense>` boundary.
- ONLY use `pnpm` — never `npm` or `yarn` in scripts or install commands.
- Prefer editing existing files over creating new ones unless the task explicitly requires a new file.
- Keep changes minimal and scoped — do not refactor surrounding code or add unsolicited documentation.
- When adding a new doc page, always add it as an MDX file in `src/features/doc/content/` with correct `DocMetadata` frontmatter — never create ad-hoc page files.

---

## Approach

1. Read the relevant source files before making any edits.
2. For registry changes, update `src/registry/index.ts` then run `pnpm registry:build` or `pnpm registry:build-v2`.
3. For styling, always cross-check tokens against `src/app/globals.css` before applying classes.
4. After edits, run `pnpm typecheck` to verify there are no TypeScript errors.
5. Use `pnpm lint` for ESLint checks and `pnpm format` to auto-fix formatting.
